description: Create the README.md for the project (ignore everything about the conductor folder/enviroment). include that this is deployed at https://basic-algorithms.kks.qzz.io create a .gitignore and add conductor/ GEMINI.md, .gitignore then upload to the repo via this commands (provided by github) git remote add origin git@github.com:kurokirasama/basic-algorithms.git git branch -M main git push -u origin main
